note_name_label: Which option gives the note name of the note marked {target_marker}?
Select the option that names the note marked {target_marker}.
Which visible option gives the pitch name shown by note {target_marker}?
Read the marked staff note {target_marker}. Which option is its note name?
Choose the option that identifies note {target_marker} by pitch name.
interval_name_label: Which option gives the interval formed by the two notes in range {target_marker}?
Select the option that identifies numbered interval {target_marker}.
Read note-pair range {target_marker} and choose the matching interval name.
Which visible option describes note-pair range {target_marker}?
transposed_pitch_pair_count: How many of the four marked note pairs show the second note transposed up by a {interval_name}?
Count the numbered note pairs where the second note is a {interval_name} above the first.
Among the four shown note-pair ranges, how many correctly move up by a {interval_name}?
How many marked pairs show the requested upward {interval_name} transposition?
Find the count of note pairs whose second note is the correct {interval_name} above the first.
key_signature_label: Which option gives the key represented by the visible key signature?
Select the option naming the major key shown by the key signature.
Which visible option gives the major key indicated by the key signature?
Read the key signature and choose the matching key name.
Choose the option for the key shown by the accidentals at the start of the staff.
scale_validation_count: How many of the four shown fragments correctly fit {target_key}?
Count the scale fragments that are correctly written for {target_key}.
Among the four marked fragments, how many match {target_key}?
How many shown scale fragments fit the key {target_key}?
Find the count of fragment ranges that correctly follow {target_key}.
scale_degree_function_label: In {target_key}, which option gives the scale-degree function of note {target_marker}?
Select the option naming the scale-degree function of note {target_marker} in {target_key}.
Using the key {target_key}, choose the option that identifies the function of note {target_marker}.
Which option gives the scale-degree name of note {target_marker} in {target_key}?
Read note {target_marker} relative to {target_key}. Which option gives its scale-degree function?
chord_quality_label: Which option gives the quality of chord {target_marker}?
Select the option naming the chord quality of numbered chord {target_marker}.
Choose the option that identifies the quality of chord {target_marker}.
Which visible option gives the chord-quality name for chord {target_marker}?
Read chord {target_marker} and choose its quality.
roman_numeral_label: In {target_key}, which option gives the roman numeral for chord {target_marker}?
Select the option naming the roman numeral of chord {target_marker} in {target_key}.
Using the key {target_key}, choose the option with the roman numeral for chord {target_marker}.
Which visible option describes the marked chord in {target_key}?
Read chord {target_marker} relative to {target_key} and choose its roman numeral.
chord_inversion_label: Which option gives the inversion of chord {target_marker}?
Select the option naming the inversion of chord {target_marker}.
Choose the option that identifies the inversion shown by chord {target_marker}.
Which visible option describes the inversion of chord {target_marker}?
Read chord {target_marker} and choose its inversion.
duration_equivalence_label: Which option names the duration of numbered note {target_marker}?
Select the option giving the duration name for note {target_marker}.
Which labeled option names the note value of note {target_marker}?
Read numbered note {target_marker}. Which option gives its duration name?
Choose the duration name for numbered note {target_marker}.
meter_type_count: How many of the four shown measures are in {target_meter_type} meter?
Count the measures whose visible time signature is {target_meter_type} meter.
Among the four displayed measures, how many use {target_meter_type} meter?
Find the number of shown measures in {target_meter_type} meter.
How many measure boxes match {target_meter_type} meter?
articulation_symbol_label: Select the option naming the numbered symbol {target_marker}.
Choose the option that identifies articulation mark {target_marker}.
Read mark {target_marker} and choose its name.

code_prompt_defaults.object_description_engraved_sheet: a clean engraved-style sheet-music staff panel with marked notation items
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_exam_scan: an exam-scan-style sheet-music staff panel with marked notation items
code_prompt_defaults.object_description_notebook_staff: a notebook-style sheet-music staff panel with marked notation items
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_note_name_label: set "annotation" to the pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the marked note
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_note_name_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_interval_name_label: set "annotation" to the pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] for the marked interval region
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_interval_name_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_transposed_pitch_pair_co: set "annotation" to an array containing every counted transposition-pair range pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]; use an empty array when no shown pairs match the requested transposition
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_transposed_pitch_pair_count: set "answer" to the integer count of note pairs that match the requested upward interval
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_key_signature_label: set "annotation" to the key-signature pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_key_signature_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_scale_validation_count: set "annotation" to an array containing every counted scale-fragment range pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]; use an empty array when no shown fragments correctly fit the requested key
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_scale_validation_count: set "answer" to the integer count of scale fragments that correctly fit the requested key
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_scale_degree_function_la: set "annotation" to an object with keys "key_signature" and "target_note", each mapped to a pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_scale_degree_function_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_chord_quality_label: set "annotation" to the target numbered chord pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_chord_quality_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_roman_numeral_label: set "annotation" to an object with keys "key_signature" and "target_chord", each mapped to a pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_roman_numeral_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_chord_inversion_label: set "annotation" to the target numbered chord pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_chord_inversion_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_duration_equivalence_lab: set "annotation" to the pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1] around the target numbered note
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_duration_equivalence_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_meter_type_count: set "annotation" to an array containing every counted measure pixel-space bounding box [x0, y0, x1, y1]; use an empty array when no shown measures have the requested meter type
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_meter_type_count: set "answer" to the integer count of measures with the requested meter type
code_prompt_defaults.annotation_hint_articulation_symbol_labe: set "annotation" to the pixel-space point [x, y] at the center of the target articulation symbol
code_prompt_defaults.answer_hint_articulation_symbol_label: set "answer" to the single capital-letter option label
